subcodes.title: Ziyarat for 'the second to believe' on 'Id al-Fitr
subcodes.first_line: Verily the All-Glorious Glory, the Most Exalted Majesty, the Most Beauteous Beauty, and the Most Supreme Grandeur [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انما البهاء الابهی و الجلال الاجلل و الجمال الاجمل و العظمة الاعظمی
